title: Forms - add copy paste feature for screenshot or snippit
excerpt: I would like for other departments who use forms to create items to be able to copy/paste a snippit or screenshot into the updates box in the form.

posts.author: abailey (Allie Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like for other departments who use forms to create items to be able to copy/paste a snippit or screenshot into the updates box in the form.

posts.author: MarkP (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature would be incredibly valuable for us too. Important teams at our company are not using monday because you cant paste a screenshot in a form. If you added it, we would absolutely buy more licenses. Take my money!
